tasks.description: Phase 1: Monorepo setup — pnpm workspaces, TypeScript, packages scaffold
tasks.details: Already complete. Monorepo scaffold with pnpm workspaces, 5 packages, shared tsconfig. Committed 5fab145.

tasks.description: Phase 1: @walkr/core scripting API — moveTo, click, type, scroll, wait, zoom, pan, highlight, sequence, parallel
tasks.details: Already complete. Full scripting API with all step types, types, and composers. Committed 6b5f083.

tasks.description: Phase 1: @walkr/engine — cursor overlay, bezier movement, click ripple, live preview
tasks.details: Implement the @walkr/engine package. See packages/engine/src/ — currently a stub. Build: CursorOverlay (DOM element, configurable arrow/circle/dot shape, click ripple animation), interpolation.ts (bezier easing functions, interpolatePosition), StepExecutor (runs each step type via requestAnimationFrame — moveTo animates cursor, click dispatches MouseEvent into iframe, type dispatches KeyboardEvent per char, scroll, wait, zoom via CSS transform, pan, highlight via backdrop overlay), WalkrPlayer (top-level class: play/pause/seek/reset, event emitter). Export all from packages/engine/src/index.ts. Validate: pnpm type-check in packages/engine.

tasks.description: Phase 2: @walkr/studio — React app, timeline viewer, scrubbing, step blocks, playback controls, step editor panel
tasks.details: Build the @walkr/studio React + Vite app. Layout: header bar | preview pane (iframe placeholder) + step panel sidebar | playback controls bar | timeline (120px). Components: PreviewPane (iframe with URL display), PlaybackControls (play/pause/step-back/step-forward/reset/loop, step counter), Timeline (horizontal step blocks colored by type, draggable playhead, resize handles on step edges, drag to reorder), StepPanel (editable fields per step type — x/y/easing for moveTo, text/delay for type, level/follow for zoom, etc.). Pre-load DEMO_WALKTHROUGH with 8 sample steps. Validate: pnpm type-check in packages/studio.

tasks.description: Phase 2: Timeline editing — resize step duration, reorder steps, write-back to JSON
tasks.details: Add interactive editing to the Timeline component in @walkr/studio. Drag right edge of a step block to resize its duration (show tooltip with new duration while dragging). Drag step blocks to reorder them (drag-and-drop with drop zone indicators between steps). Changes update walkthrough state immutably. Add export-to-JSON button in header: downloads the current walkthrough definition as walkthrough.json. Validate: pnpm type-check in packages/studio.

tasks.description: Phase 3: Camera zoom + follow — zoom step, follow: true, pan step, easing
tasks.details: Ensure zoom() and pan() steps are fully implemented in @walkr/engine. Zoom: animate CSS transform scale on the iframe container div (not the iframe itself) over step.duration ms. follow: true = keep cursor centered in viewport during movement by adjusting transform-origin dynamically as cursor moves. Pan: animate CSS transform translate. Both use the easing functions from interpolation.ts. Add zoom/pan controls to @walkr/studio StepPanel for editing zoom level, follow toggle, easing. Validate: pnpm type-check in both packages.

tasks.description: Phase 3: Cursor customisation — shape, color, size, custom SVG, scroll indicator
tasks.details: Extend CursorOverlay in @walkr/engine to support full cursor config: shape (arrow = SVG arrow matching native cursor shape, circle = ring, dot = filled), color (#hex), size (px), shadow (boolean, drop-shadow filter), clickColor (ripple color), opacity. Add a cursor config panel in @walkr/studio — sidebar section in App.tsx or a CursorConfig panel. Preview shows cursor with selected config. Add scroll indicator: small animated chevron shown below the cursor during scroll steps. Validate: pnpm type-check.

tasks.description: Phase 4: @walkr/cli — walkr dev and walkr export commands
tasks.details: Build @walkr/cli package. Two commands: (1) walkr dev <script.json> — starts @walkr/studio Vite dev server (by running vite in packages/studio), watches the JSON file for changes, sends a WebSocket reload signal to the studio when file changes. Accept --port flag. (2) walkr export <script.json> --format mp4|gif|webm --output <path> --width 1280 --height 720 — validates the JSON walkthrough file, calls @walkr/playwright capture, pipes frames to ffmpeg. Use commander.js for CLI arg parsing. Add bin entry to package.json: { 'walkr': './dist/cli.js' }. Validate: pnpm type-check in packages/cli.

tasks.description: Phase 4: @walkr/playwright — headless capture adapter, frame recording, ffmpeg export
tasks.details: Build @walkr/playwright package. Uses Playwright to launch a real Chromium browser, navigate to the walkthrough URL, inject @walkr/engine as a script bundle, execute all steps, and capture frames using page.screenshot() after each animation frame. Write frames to a temp dir as PNG sequences. Then invoke ffmpeg (CLI) to encode: MP4 (libx264, yuv420p), GIF (palette generation pass), WebM (libvpx-vp9). Export: captureWalkthrough(walkthroughDef, outputPath, format, options). Progress callback for frame count. Validate: pnpm type-check in packages/playwright.

tasks.description: Phase 5: highlight() step — spotlight element, backdrop, configurable color + duration
tasks.details: Fully implement highlight() step execution in @walkr/engine StepExecutor. When a highlight step runs: inject a full-screen backdrop div (rgba black, 0.6 opacity) that fades in over 200ms. Query the target selector in the iframe document, get its bounding rect. Render a highlight ring (border 2px solid, configurable color, border-radius matching element) at that position. Hold for step.duration - 400ms. Then fade out backdrop and ring over 200ms. Add highlight config fields (selector, color, duration) to StepPanel in studio. Validate: pnpm type-check.

tasks.description: Phase 5: Embed export — interactive iframe player, self-contained bundle, share URL
tasks.details: Add embed export to @walkr/cli: walkr export <script.json> --format embed --output dist/. Generates a self-contained index.html that includes @walkr/engine bundled inline (via Vite library build) and the walkthrough JSON embedded. The page auto-plays the walkthrough on load with a play button overlay. No external dependencies — fully offline-capable. Include player controls (play/pause/replay) in the embed. Validate: pnpm type-check in packages/cli and packages/engine.

tasks.description: Phase 5: npm publish — @walkr/core, @walkr/cli public packages, README, create-walkr scaffold
tasks.details: Prepare for npm publish. Write comprehensive README.md at repo root: overview, quick start (npm create walkr@latest), API reference for @walkr/core step functions with TypeScript examples, CLI usage, cursor config options, export formats. Write README for packages/core and packages/cli. Create packages/create-walkr: an npm init scaffolding package that generates a starter project with a demo.json walkthrough and package.json with @walkr/cli dependency. Add publishConfig: { access: public } to packages/core and packages/cli package.json. Set up .npmignore. Do not actually publish — just prepare everything so running npm publish would succeed. Validate: pnpm type-check across all packages.
